items.title: Send acquisition materials to Ray for buyer introduction

notes_for_orchestrator: D1.6 extracted 51 action items from 11 meetings (batch 2026-01-15 to 2026-01-16). Used B05_ACTION_ITEMS.md where available, fell back to transcript.md. Semantic extraction via Zo API. Initially had timeout on thesis meeting but successfully retried with extended timeout.
